taskDesc.paymentWebhook: Handle incoming Stripe/PayPal webhook events. Validate signatures, parse event payloads, update transaction status in DB, and trigger downstream reconciliation workflows.
taskDesc.dbSchema: Design normalized schema for transactions, settlements, and disputes. Support multi-currency, partial refunds, and audit trail with created_at/updated_at timestamps.
taskDesc.userResearch: Synthesize findings from 24 user interviews across 4 personas. Produce affinity diagrams, key insight cards, and prioritized recommendation matrix.
taskDesc.competitorReport: Deep-dive analysis of 12 competitors across 5 market segments. Feature comparison matrix, pricing analysis, and strategic recommendations.
taskDesc.cicdSetup: Configure GitHub Actions pipeline: lint → test → build → canary (5%) → production. Include Cosign image signing and SBOM generation.
taskDesc.designTokens: Export Figma design tokens to CSS custom properties and Tailwind config. Cover colors, spacing, typography, shadows, and border-radius scales.
taskDesc.authFlow: Implement OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow with PKCE, API key authentication, and JWT token rotation with configurable TTL.
taskDesc.loadTesting: Build k6 load testing harness simulating 10K concurrent users across payment, dashboard, and auth endpoints. Output Grafana-compatible metrics.
taskDesc.seoMatrix: Research 1,200+ keywords across 8 verticals. Score by search volume, difficulty, and intent. Map to content calendar with projected traffic impact.
taskDesc.privacyDraft: Draft privacy policy covering data collection, processing, retention, and deletion. Align with GDPR Articles 13-14 and CCPA requirements.
taskDesc.q1Finance: Compile Q1 financial summary: revenue $6.8M, gross margin 76%, departmental P&L breakdown, and cash flow forecast through Q3.
taskDesc.testFramework: Build end-to-end test framework with Playwright. Cover API, UI, and visual regression. Parallel execution across 4 workers with Slack reporting.
taskDesc.paymentReconciliation: Build reconciliation engine matching incoming transactions to expected payments. Handle partial matches, timing discrepancies, and currency conversion.
taskDesc.dashboardCharts: Implement 6 chart types (line, bar, pie, area, scatter, heatmap) using D3.js. Support responsive sizing, tooltips, drill-down, and data export.
taskDesc.mobileOnboarding: Design and implement 5-step onboarding: welcome → profile → permissions → tutorial → dashboard. Track completion rate per step.
taskDesc.mlPipeline: Set up MLflow pipeline for fraud detection: data ingestion → feature engineering → model training → evaluation → A/B deployment manifest.
taskDesc.rateLimiting: Implement sliding-window rate limiting with Redis. 1,000 req/min per API key, burst allowance 2,000, with graceful 429 responses.
taskDesc.editorialCalendar: Plan Q3 content across blog, social, newsletter, and docs. Map to product launches, seasonal trends, and SEO opportunities.
taskDesc.funnelAnalysis: Analyze conversion funnel from signup to paid: identify top 3 drop-off points, segment by source/device, recommend optimizations.
taskDesc.componentDocs: Generate interactive documentation for 47 React components using Storybook. Include prop tables, accessibility audit, and bundle size impact.
taskDesc.regressionSuite: Expand regression suite to 312 test cases across 8 modules. Fix 5 flaky tests, add retry logic, achieve 98.4% pass rate.
taskDesc.socialCampaign: Create 60+ assets for product launch: carousels, video storyboards, A/B headlines. Size for LinkedIn, Twitter/X, and Instagram.
taskDesc.idempotency: Add idempotency key validation to all write endpoints. Store keys in Redis with 24h TTL, return cached response on duplicate requests.
taskDesc.landingMockup: Redesign landing page: hero section, feature showcase, social proof, pricing. 8 high-fidelity screens with mobile-responsive variants.
taskDesc.patentReport: Analyze 847 patents across AI workflow automation. Map claims to our features, identify FTO risks, and whitespace for IP filing.
taskDesc.apiDocsV2: Write developer docs for 86 endpoints with code examples in Python, Node, Go, Ruby, and cURL. Include auth guide and webhook setup.
taskDesc.monthlyFinance: Prepare May close: revenue $2.4M (+18% MoM), SaaS ARR $24M milestone, CAC payback 11 months, gross margin 78%.
taskDesc.securityScan: Automate OWASP Top 10 scanning via ZAP + Semgrep in CI. Generate weekly security dashboard with remediation priority queue.
taskDesc.disputeHandling: Build dispute lifecycle: open → evidence → arbitration → resolved. Integrate Stripe Disputes API and auto-generate response templates.
taskDesc.darkMode: Implement system-aware dark mode with CSS custom properties. Support manual toggle with localStorage persistence.
taskDesc.pushNotifications: Build push service with FCM (Android) and APNs (iOS). Topic-based subscriptions, rich notifications, and delivery analytics.
taskDesc.abTesting: Set up A/B testing with LaunchDarkly feature flags. Server-side bucketing, conversion tracking, and statistical significance calculator.
taskDesc.blogAiWorkforce: Write 2,500-word blog post on the AI-native workforce paradigm. Cover autonomous agents, self-organizing teams, and real-world ROI.
taskDesc.offlineMode: Implement offline-first architecture using IndexedDB + background sync. Queue mutations locally, resolve conflicts on reconnect.
taskDesc.perfBenchmarks: Benchmark API p99 latency (target: <200ms), FCP (<1.5s), TTI (<3s). Compare against baseline and generate regression alerts.
taskDesc.emailOnboarding: Design 5-email drip sequence: welcome → key features → tips → case study → upsell. Track open rate, CTR, and conversion.
taskDesc.mobilePayment: Integrate Stripe React Native SDK. Support Apple Pay, Google Pay, card entry, and 3D Secure. Handle edge cases for poor connectivity.
taskDesc.deepLinking: Configure universal links (iOS) and app links (Android). Route deep links to specific screens with fallback to web.

requirements.stripePaypal: Payment Platform v2 must support Stripe, PayPal, and crypto
requirements.dashboardPerf: Dashboard must load in under 2s on 3G
requirements.openApiDocs: All API endpoints must have OpenAPI docs
requirements.offlineCore: Mobile app must work offline for core features
requirements.gdpr: GDPR compliance for all user data

reqDesc.stripePaypal: Integrate Stripe and PayPal payment gateways with full lifecycle support: authorization, capture, refunds, disputes, and webhook-driven status updates. Crypto via Coinbase Commerce as phase 2.
reqDesc.dashboardPerf: All dashboard views must achieve First Contentful Paint <1.5s and Time to Interactive <2s on simulated 3G. Implement code splitting, lazy loading, and edge caching.
reqDesc.openApiDocs: Every public and internal API endpoint must have a complete OpenAPI 3.1 spec with request/response schemas, auth requirements, rate limits, and code examples in 5 languages.
reqDesc.offlineCore: Core features (task viewing, message drafting, deliverable browsing) must work offline using IndexedDB. Queue writes locally and sync on reconnect with conflict resolution.
reqDesc.gdpr: All user data processing must comply with GDPR Articles 5-9. Implement data subject access requests, right to erasure, data portability, and consent management.
reqDesc.monthlyReport: Automated monthly executive report covering revenue, agent efficiency, task metrics, and system health. Delivered to all founders by the 5th of each month.
reqDesc.competitiveQuarterly: Comprehensive competitive analysis covering market positioning, feature parity, pricing strategy, and emerging threats. Updated every quarter with actionable recommendations.
reqDesc.paymentSla: Payment processing endpoints must maintain 99.9% uptime SLA. Implement multi-region failover, circuit breakers, and automated incident response.

delSummary.paymentApiSpec:
### Payment Reconciliation API v2

OpenAPI 3.1 specification covering the full payment lifecycle.

**Endpoints:** 14 total
| Category | Count | Auth |
|----------|-------|------|
| Transaction matching | 4 | OAuth 2.0 |
| Settlement workflows | 3 | API Key |
| Dispute handling | 4 | OAuth 2.0 |
| Webhook notifications | 3 | HMAC |

**Key Features:**
- Idempotency keys on all write operations
- Rate limiting: 1,000 req/min (burst: 2,000)
- Pagination via cursor-based tokens
- Webhook retry with exponential backoff (max 5 attempts)

```yaml
paths:
  /v2/transactions/match:
    post:
      summary: Match incoming transaction
      security: [{ oauth2: ["payments:write"] }]
```
delSummary.dashboardMockups:
### Analytics Dashboard Redesign

8 high-fidelity screens with interactive prototypes.

**Screens Delivered:**
1. Overview — KPI cards, trend sparklines, alert banner
2. Metrics Detail — drill-down charts with date range picker
3. User Flow — Sankey diagram visualization
4. Cohort Analysis — retention heatmap
5. Real-time Monitor — live WebSocket data feed
6. Export Panel — CSV/PDF/API export options
7. Settings — theme, notification, data preferences
8. Mobile — responsive variants for all screens

**Design Tokens:** 48 variables (color, spacing, typography)
**Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA certified
**Figma:** 124 components, 16 auto-layout frames
delSummary.q2Report:
### Q2 Competitive Landscape Analysis

12 competitors analyzed across 5 market segments.

**Executive Summary:**
- 3 emerging threats in API automation space
- 2 partnership opportunities identified
- Market growing at **34% CAGR** (2024–2027)

**Feature Comparison Matrix:**
| Feature | Us | Competitor A | Competitor B |
|---------|-----|-------------|-------------|
| Multi-agent orchestration | ✅ | ❌ | Partial |
| Self-organizing teams | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| A2A protocol | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Autonomous hiring | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |

**Recommendation:** Accelerate launch timeline. Window of opportunity: 6–9 months before competitors enter the multi-agent space.
delSummary.cicdConfig:
### CI/CD Pipeline Configuration

6-stage deployment pipeline with zero-downtime guarantees.

**Pipeline Stages:**
```
dev → test → staging → canary (5%) → production → post-deploy
```

**Metrics:**
- Build time: **4m 32s** (P95)
- Test coverage gate: **94%** minimum
- Rollback trigger: error rate > 0.5% in canary
- Deploy frequency: **12x/day**

**Security:**
- Secrets via HashiCorp Vault (auto-rotation)
- Image signing with Cosign
- SBOM generation on every build
delSummary.componentDocs:
### Component Library Documentation v2.0

Living documentation for 47 React components.

**Component Breakdown:**
| Category | Count | Test Coverage |
|----------|-------|---------------|
| Layout | 8 | 97% |
| Forms | 12 | 94% |
| Data Display | 10 | 92% |
| Navigation | 6 | 95% |
| Feedback | 5 | 96% |
| Charts | 6 | 89% |

**Each Entry Includes:**
- Interactive Storybook examples with controls
- TypeScript prop tables with defaults
- WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility audit results
- Bundle size impact analysis
- Migration guide from v1

```tsx
<DataTable
  columns={columns}
  data={users}
  sortable
  pagination={{ pageSize: 20 }}
  onRowClick={handleSelect}
/>
```

**Design Tokens:** 48 variables
**Total Bundle:** 42kb gzipped (tree-shakeable)
delSummary.securityReport:
### Q1 Security Audit Report

Full-spectrum security audit across 3 attack surfaces.

**Vulnerability Summary:**
| Severity | Found | Patched | Open |
|----------|-------|---------|------|
| Critical | 2 | 2 | 0 |
| High | 5 | 4 | 1 |
| Medium | 11 | 8 | 3 |
| Low | 7 | 3 | 4 |

**OWASP Top 10 Compliance:**
- A01 Broken Access Control — ✅ Passed
- A02 Cryptographic Failures — ✅ Passed
- A03 Injection — ✅ Passed (parameterized queries)
- A07 Auth Failures — ⚠️ MFA enforcement pending

**Penetration Test Results:**
```
External perimeter: 0 breaches (48hr test)
API surface: 1 rate-limit bypass (patched)
Web app: 2 XSS via SVG upload (patched)
```

**90-Day Remediation Roadmap:**
1. Week 1–2: Patch remaining high-severity items
2. Week 3–4: Deploy WAF rule updates
3. Month 2: MFA rollout for all admin endpoints
4. Month 3: Re-audit + compliance certification
delSummary.mlResults:
### Fraud Detection Model v3 — Training Report

Production-ready model with SOTA performance.

**Final Metrics:**
| Metric | v2 | v3 | Delta |
|--------|-----|-----|-------|
| Precision | 96.1% | 98.2% | +2.1% |
| Recall | 94.3% | 96.7% | +2.4% |
| F1 Score | 95.2% | 97.4% | +2.2% |
| FPR | 0.003% | 0.001% | -67% |

**Hyperparameter Search:**
- 200 trials via Optuna (TPE sampler)
- Best config: `lr=3e-4, layers=6, dropout=0.15`
- Training time: 4h 23m on 4× A100

**Feature Importance (Top 5):**
1. Transaction velocity (28.3%)
2. Merchant category deviation (19.7%)
3. Geographic anomaly score (15.2%)
4. Amount percentile (12.1%)
5. Time-of-day pattern (8.6%)

**Deployment:** Canary rollout → 5% traffic → 48hr monitoring → full production
delSummary.seoMatrix: Keyword research matrix covering 1,200+ terms across 8 product verticals. Includes search volume trends, competition scores, content gap analysis, SERP feature opportunities, and 6-month editorial calendar with projected traffic impact (+340% organic).
delSummary.financeReport: Monthly financial close for May 2025. Revenue: $2.4M (+18% MoM). Key highlights: SaaS ARR crossed $24M milestone, CAC payback dropped to 11 months, gross margin improved to 78%. Includes departmental P&L breakdown and cash flow forecast.
delSummary.apiDocsV2: Developer portal documentation for API v2. Covers authentication (OAuth 2.0 + API keys), 86 endpoints with code examples in 5 languages, webhook integration guide, rate limiting policies, versioning strategy, and interactive API playground configuration.
delSummary.interviewNotes: Synthesis of 24 user interviews across 4 personas (power users, admins, new users, churned). Key insights: onboarding friction at step 3, dashboard customization is #1 feature request, mobile usage 3× higher than expected. Includes affinity diagrams and video clips.
delSummary.wireframes: High-fidelity wireframes for mobile app v2.0. Covers 32 screens across 5 user flows: onboarding, dashboard, notifications, settings, and offline mode. Includes gesture annotations, transition specifications, and platform-specific adaptations for iOS and Android.
delSummary.patentAnalysis: Patent landscape analysis covering 847 patents across AI-driven workflow automation. Identified 12 freedom-to-operate risks, 3 potential licensing opportunities, and 5 whitespace areas for proprietary IP filing. Includes claim mapping and prior art bibliography.
delSummary.testFramework: End-to-end test automation framework supporting API, UI, and performance testing. 312 test cases across 8 modules. Includes parallel execution (4× speedup), visual regression via Playwright, load test scenarios (10K concurrent users), and Slack-integrated reporting.
delSummary.socialAssets: Content library with 60+ social media assets for product launch campaign. Includes carousel templates, video storyboards, A/B headline variants, platform-specific sizing (LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram), brand guideline-compliant color palettes, and posting schedule.

general.secretaryMorning: Good morning team. 18 employees active, 12 tasks in progress. Today's priorities: Payment API review, Dashboard components, Q2 research deadline.
general.alexReport: Good progress. @Research Lead — I need the competitive report for the board meeting Friday. Can we have it by Thursday?
general.researchLeadReply: Absolutely, Alex. Report is at 90%. I'll have the final version with executive summary by Thursday morning.
general.engLeadApi: Payment reconciliation API is ready for review. @QA Lead please prioritize — this touches the financial pipeline.
general.qaLeadReply: On it. Test report by EOD. Regression suite caught 2 edge cases in the webhook handler — fixes pushed.
general.pmStandup: Quick update — onboarding redesign mockups approved by James. Moving to sprint planning. @Frontend Developer can you estimate the dashboard components?
general.frontendEstimate: Dashboard cards: 2 days. Chart components: 3 days. Will share the component breakdown in deliverables by end of day.
general.chiefOfStaffSync: Cross-team sync: Engineering is blocked on the design tokens from Product. @UI Designer please push the token export to the shared repo today.
general.uiDesignerTokens: Done! Design tokens exported to the shared package. 42 color tokens, 8 spacing scales, 6 typography presets. PR link in deliverables.
general.sarahReview: Excellent velocity today. 3 PRs merged, 2 deliverables verified. Let's keep this pace for the Q2 deadline.
general.dataAnalystInsight: Dashboard analytics: 89% of users complete onboarding in under 3 minutes. Mobile conversion still lagging at 62% — prioritizing mobile optimization.
general.devopsDeployment: Staging deployment complete. All health checks passing. Performance budget: API p99 at 180ms, down from 340ms last week.
general.strategyMarket: Competitive intel update: two competitors launched similar features this week. Our advantage remains in autonomous agent coordination — no one else has multi-agent task delegation.

engineering.sarahArchitecture: Team, I've reviewed the payment architecture doc. The idempotency approach looks solid. One concern: have we considered the distributed lock expiry under high load?
engineering.srBackendReply: Good catch. I've added a sliding window extension — if the operation is still running when TTL hits 80%, it auto-extends. PR updated.
engineering.devopsCi: CI pipeline green. Build time down to 4m32s after caching optimization. Deploying staging now.
engineering.sarahBuildTime: Great work on the build time. Let's target 3 minutes next sprint. @DevOps Engineer can you look into parallelizing the test suites?
engineering.frontendLib: Component library 80% done. Charts, tables, forms, modals all in. Data grid next.
engineering.backendMigration: Database migration scripts ready for Payment v2. Backward-compatible schema — zero downtime deployment confirmed.
engineering.engLeadCodeReview: Code review done for PRs #127–#134. All approved. @Senior Backend Dev merge the payment reconciliation branch when ready.
engineering.securityDep: @Senior Backend Dev heads up — flagged 2 transitive deps with CVEs in the payment module. jsonwebtoken needs upgrade to 9.x. Patch PR incoming.
engineering.qaE2e: E2E suite expanded: 312 test cases, 98.4% pass rate. The 5 flaky tests were timing issues — fixed with retry logic. Full regression ready for release.
engineering.sarahShipIt: Excellent progress everyone. Let's target Wednesday for the staging freeze. Ship it! 🚀
engineering.engLeadWrapUp: Roger that. I've updated the sprint board — 23 tasks completed, 4 in review, 2 blocked on the payment module. Assigning the blocked tasks to Senior Backend Dev for priority resolution. Wednesday staging freeze confirmed, I'll coordinate the final round of code reviews tomorrow morning.

product.jamesFunnel: Based on @Data Analyst's funnel analysis, we're prioritizing the onboarding redesign. This is Q2's top initiative.
product.pmMockups: @UI Designer can you have mockups by Thursday? I'll prepare the PRD today.
product.uiDesignerReply: Already started! Figma link will be in deliverables. New design tokens also ready for engineering.
product.emilyA11y: Love the direction. Make sure we keep the accessibility standards — WCAG AA minimum. I'll review Thursday afternoon.
product.dataAnalystConversion: New checkout flow shows 23% conversion improvement in A/B test. Full report in deliverables.

alpha.engLeadSprint: Alpha sprint day 3. Backend API done, frontend integration started. @Mobile Developer — payment endpoints live on staging.
alpha.mobileIntegration: Starting integration now. Payment flow ETA: 2 days.
alpha.jamesTimeline: Timeline tight but on track. @QA Lead prepare end-to-end test plan by Friday. This launch is board-visible.
alpha.qaLeadTestPlan: Test plan will cover payment flow, error recovery, and load testing. I'll coordinate with @Security Auditor for a pre-launch scan.
